critical.label: CRITICAL
critical.description: Active breach, ransomware, data exfiltration, or full system compromise

high.label: HIGH
high.description: Successful intrusion attempt, privilege escalation, lateral movement detected

medium.label: MEDIUM
medium.description: Suspicious activity, policy violations, failed but repeated attack attempts

low.label: LOW
low.description: Informational alerts, single failed login, minor policy deviations
